item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-26 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] xbtlin/ai-berkshire (+1329 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1329，总 stars 2,844，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws (+253 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +253，总 stars 1,261，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mauriceboe/TREK (+1122 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1122，总 stars 7,281，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] opendatalab/MinerU (+1001 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows. Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1001，总 stars 70,099，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] IceWhaleTech/CasaOS (+646 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system. Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +646，总 stars 35,126，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 信号存在不确定性，建议先检查 README、最近 commit 和 issue 质量后再投入时间。 Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] automazeio/ccpm (+7 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development. Why it matters: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals. Developer insight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules (+22 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A curated collection of .mdc configuration files that customize Cursor AI editor behavior for specific frameworks, libraries, and workflows. Why it matters: The repo has 39,842 stars and is accelerating sharply: 30 stars in the last 24 hours, 125 in the last 7 days, with a 7-day average of 16 stars/day and a 3-day average of 10.7 stars/day. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 (high) and the 'sudden_breakout' trend type indicate a recent spike in attention, likely driven by the growing adoption of Cursor AI and the need for project-specific rules. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'AI configuration as a shared asset' — teams are treating AI behavior as something that can be version-controlled, reviewed, and optimized just like code. Expect more curated rule collections and possibly a marketplace for AI editor rules. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1861 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1861，总 stars 41,896，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+3031 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +3031，总 stars 23,064，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low
